password.title: Set Your Unlock Password
password.description: This password protects access to your node. Store it safely.
password.label: Password
password.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

backup.title: Backup Your Recovery Phrase
backup.description: Write down these words in order and keep them safe. You will need them to recover your wallet.
backup.confirmed: I have written down my recovery phrase
backup.warning: Never share your recovery phrase with anyone.

complete.title: You're all set!
complete.description: Your node is ready to use.
